outcome: Causality as the operational knowledge surface, carried by outcome-pressure
note: The checkable projection of the human-legible outcome doc. The .md holds the narrative and the prose checks (browser-drive, test-green); this file expresses each probe's check in a form loop/pressure.py can resolve deterministically against committed bytes or log records. A probe whose check the fold cannot resolve is refused at load (no aspirational prose enters the set). 'met' requires the evidence to resolve on disk now; a browser-drive cap probe resolves against a committed verification attestation under outcomes/evidence/, never against a procedure the fold cannot run.

probes.move: this done-line builds it: loop/pressure.py + a committed probe-set + tests green
loop.summon --hook hands the waking session the outcome's top leverage, not only gaps work-pressure; a test drives the hook and asserts the line

probes.statement: pressure composes (owner + work + outcome into one ranked field)
probes.move: owner-pressure + work-pressure (gaps) + outcome-pressure fold into one ranked field; a fixture test ranks across all three
build persistence: the canvas engine gains a save verb, a graph survives reload; then commit outcomes/evidence/cz1-persistence.md attesting the browser drive
click node -> config panel for its type; click edge -> its config; a field change persists; then commit outcomes/evidence/cz2-config.md attesting it
the editable canvas loads real log/atoms/term-projection, not demo data; then commit outcomes/evidence/cz3-ingest.md attesting it

probes.statement: Causality projects the typed knowledge graph
probes.move: terms, probes, artifacts, folds, agents, sites, records, evidence render as a living typed graph with evidence edges, in-canvas; today term_economy projects terms only (partial)

probes.statement: sessions inherit and reduce pressure across wakes
probes.move: a use-trace on the log: a waking session received the outcome-pressure line and a subsequent receipt resolved a probe (unmet->met)
the fold, re-run in a new session, still reports the unresolved probes as continuing pressure; a use-trace shows no victory declared on partial work
